rows.headline: Bernie Sanders Says 70% Americans Think AI Is 'Moving Too Fast' And It's Time Congress Listened To Them — Not Just The Billionaires Pushing The Tech

rows.summary: Musk backed Huang's warning that workers who ignore AI risk being replaced as artificial intelligence reshapes the global workforce.

rows.headline: Bitcoin, Ethereum Tread Water, XRP, Dogecoin Slide Amid Trump's 'Limited' Period Warning On Iran: Analyst Says BTC 'Doesn't Look Great'
rows.summary: Leading cryptocurrencies stayed weak alongside stocks on Tuesday as President Donald Trump warned the U.S. would wait only for a "limited period of time" if a deal with Iran is not made sooner.

rows.headline: Chip Stocks Just Hit A Record Overbought Level: History Shows The Aftermath Is Rough
rows.summary: BofA technical strategist Paul Ciana flagged an all-time-high weekly RSI on the VanEck Semiconductor ETF this week. Seven prior signals since 1995 averaged a 44% drawdown that took roughly 73 weeks to bottom.

rows.headline: Elon Musk Says Tesla Robotaxis Could Go Widespread This Year, But Prediction Markets Say 'Nah'
